_comment: AES-WEB-002M.3 operator demo media. Repository-owned, deterministic, programmatically-generated geometric illustrations (see media/) -- clearly demo imagery, never photographs of any real business. Paths are relative to this launch-package directory; keys match the surviving deduplicated seed records by (name, city, state). The hotel listing is deliberately image-less to prove the mixed/no-image fallback in the real sample.
